candidates.why: Explicit D&A line related to cost of revenues, but it appears to be a component of the selected COGS bucket because 'Cost of Revenues' plus these D&A lines reconciles to 'Cost of Revenues - Total' / the selected 'Cost of goods sold'. Adding it separately would double count.

Explicit COGS-related amortization line, but it appears nested within/reconciling into the selected COGS total ('Cost of goods sold'). Since the selected parent row already includes it, it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected COGS row is a parent/total bucket. The separate cost-of-revenues amortization/depreciation rows reconcile into that total, so COGS D&A is already embedded.

candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component within the selected 'Research and development expenses' row, which appears to reconcile with 'Research & Development Expense'. It is already embedded in the selected XSGA component. Also, the same R&D parent row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA rows are parent totals/components above EBIT. The visible D&A-like subrows sit inside those parents rather than alongside them. In particular, R&D depreciation is already contained in the selected R&D row and should not be added separately.
